name: Tabbouli
recipeInstructions:
A traditional Middle Eastern dish featuring bulgur wheat and fresh herbs. Serve with Toasted Pita Chips (see separate recipe) and raw vegetables.
1. Place uncooked bulgur in a bowl. Pour boiling water over it and let soak for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
2. Drain well in a fine strainer.
3. Return bulgur to the bowl and add all other ingredients. Mix well.
4. Chill for 2 hours.
Yield: 8 servings, 6 cups
One Serving: 1/4 cup Calories: 179 Protein: 4 g Fat: 7 g Carbohydrate: 26 g Fiber: 0.3 g Cholesterol: 0 mg Sodium: 9 mg Potassium: 254 mg Exchange: 1 Starch/Bread 2 Vegetable 1 Fat
